_publications._publicationTitle: Canonical Wnt/β-catenin signaling drives human schwann cell transformation, progression, and tumor maintenance.

_contextSnippet: the MPNST cell lines were quite sensitive with relatively low IC50s of 0.047uM to 2.22uM for XAV-939 and 0.055uM to 186.87uM for IWR-1
details: IC50 values of 0.047-2.22μM for XAV-939 and 0.055-186.87μM for IWR-1
